scenes.name: Land on visualizer home
scenes.note: Hold on the centered empty-state canvas and bottom control bar so viewers understand this is an audio visualizer with multiple modes and export controls.

scenes.name: Hover Bars mode
scenes.note: Start by emphasizing the default mode control in the mode strip.

scenes.name: Notice mode strip layout
scenes.note: Notice the seven available visualizer modes lined up across the bottom toolbar.

scenes.name: Switch to Spectrogram
scenes.note: Show that a single tap changes the visualization mode.

scenes.name: Observe Spectrogram selected
scenes.note: Notice the selected state moving to Spectrogram, signaling fast mode switching even before audio is loaded.

scenes.name: Switch to Radial
scenes.note: Demonstrate another style to reinforce the variety of canvas modes.

scenes.name: Observe Radial selected
scenes.note: Notice the mode toggle remains compact and immediate, ideal for live performance tweaking.

scenes.name: Switch to Particles
scenes.note: Land on a more dynamic-looking mode for the remainder of the walkthrough.

scenes.name: Observe Particles selected
scenes.note: Notice Particles is now active, hinting at the breadth of rendering styles available.

scenes.name: Choose a different palette
scenes.note: Show palette customization using one of the color chips in the toolbar.

scenes.name: Observe palette chip change
scenes.note: Notice the palette controls are instantly accessible for changing the visual mood.

scenes.name: Switch aspect ratio to portrait
scenes.note: Highlight the social-friendly portrait export format.
